- Third Man, The (1949) (Film-Noir|Mystery|Thriller): Rated 3.0/5
- Vertigo (1958) (Drama|Mystery|Romance|Thriller): Rated 5.0/5
- Runaway Train (1985) (Action|Adventure|Drama|Thriller): Rated 4.0/5
- Die Hard (1988) (Action|Crime|Thriller): Rated 5.0/5
- Life Is Beautiful (La Vita è bella) (1997) (Comedy|Drama|Romance|War): Rated 5.0/5

Consider these two movies they have not seen:

- Movie A: Godfather, The (1972) (Crime|Drama), average rating 4.31/5 (2098 ratings)
- Movie B: Psycho III (1986) (Horror|Thriller), average rating 2.23/5 (32 ratings)

A decision tree trained on this dataset finds that when the two movies' average ratings differ by more than 2.00, users prefer the higher-rated movie 94% of the time.

TASK: Predict which movie Person 1 would rate higher. Explain your reasoning in 1 sentence. Then conclude with exactly 'PREDICTION: 1' (Movie A) or 'PREDICTION: 0' (Movie B).

- Double Indemnity (1944) (Crime|Drama|Film-Noir): Rated 4.0/5
- Horror Express (1972) (Horror): Rated 2.0/5

Consider these two movies they have not seen:

- Movie A: Who Framed Roger Rabbit? (1988) (Adventure|Animation|Children|Comedy|Crime|Fantasy|Mystery), average rating 3.57/5 (777 ratings)
- Movie B: Meatballs 4 (1992) (Comedy), average rating 1.50/5 (4 ratings)

A decision tree trained on this dataset finds that when the two movies' average ratings differ by more than 2.00, users prefer the higher-rated movie 94% of the time.

TASK: Predict which movie Person 1 would rate higher. Explain your reasoning in 1 sentence. Then conclude with exactly 'PREDICTION: 1' (Movie A) or 'PREDICTION: 0' (Movie B).
